href="/hyperliquid-docs/for-developers/api">API</a></li></ol></nav><h1 class="text-2xl @xs:text-3xl @lg:text-4xl leading-tight font-bold flex items-center gap-[.5em] grow text-pretty clear-right xs:clear-none">Exchange endpoint</h1><p class="text-lg text-tint clear-both">The exchange endpoint is used to interact with and trade on the Hyperliquid chain. See the Python SDK for code to generate signatures for these requests.</p></header><div class="flex flex-col [&amp;&gt;*+*]:mt-5 whitespace-pre-wrap"><h3 id="asset" class="text-lg @xs:text-xl @lg:text-2xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin) text-start self-start justify-start relative group/hash mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 column-first-of-type:pt-0 pt-[0.75em]" data-pdf-heading="true"><div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:pl-2"><a class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-snug" aria-label="Direct link to heading" href="#asset"><svg class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4"><title>hashtag</title><defs><mask id="_R_20d39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_" style="mask-type:alpha"><image data-testid="mask-image" href="https://ka-p.fontawesome.com/releases/v7.1.0/svgs/regular/hashtag.svg?v=2&amp;token=a463935e93" width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></image></mask></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#_R_20d39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_)"></rect></svg></a></div><div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-snug">Asset</div></h3><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">Many of the requests take asset as an input. For perpetuals this is the index in the <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">universe</code> field returned by the<code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">meta</code> response. For spot assets, use <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">10000 + index</code> where <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">index</code> is the corresponding index in <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">spotMeta.universe</code>. For example, when submitting an order for <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">PURR/USDC</code>, the asset that should be used is <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">10000</code> because its asset index in the spot metadata is <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">0</code>.</p><h3 id="subaccounts-and-vaults" class="text-lg @xs:text-xl @lg:text-2xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin) text-start self-start justify-start relative group/hash mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 column-first-of-type:pt-0 pt-[0.75em]" data-pdf-heading="true"><div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&amp;]:pl-2"><a class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-snug" aria-label="Direct link to heading" href="#subaccounts-and-vaults"><svg class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4"><title>hashtag</title><defs><mask id="_R_20t39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_" style="mask-type:alpha"><image data-testid="mask-image" href="https://ka-p.fontawesome.com/releases/v7.1.0/svgs/regular/hashtag.svg?v=2&amp;token=a463935e93" width="100%" height="100%" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"></image></mask></defs><rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="currentColor" mask="url(#_R_20t39bsnqj6iv5ubsnpfivb_)"></rect></svg></a></div><div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-snug">Subaccounts and vaults</div></h3><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">Subaccounts and vaults do not have private keys. To perform actions on behalf of a subaccount or vault signing should be done by the master account and the vaultAddress field should be set to the address of the subaccount or vault. The basic_vault.py example in the Python SDK demonstrates this.</p><h3 id="expires-after" class="text-lg @xs:text-xl @lg:text-2xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline After</div></h3><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">Some actions support an optional field <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">expiresAfter</code> which is a timestamp in milliseconds after which the action will be rejected. User-signed actions such as Core USDC transfer do not support the <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">expiresAfter</code> field. Note that actions consume 5x the usual address-based rate limit when canceled due to a stale <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">expiresAfter</code> field. </p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">See the Python SDK for details on how to incorporate this field when signing. </p><h2 id="place-an-order" class="text-xl @xs:text-2xl @lg:text-3xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline text-start self-start justify-start"></p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">For limit orders, TIF (time-in-force) sets the behavior of the order upon first hitting the book.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">ALO (add liquidity only, i.e. &quot;post only&quot;) will be canceled instead of immediately matching.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">IOC (immediate or cancel) will have the unfilled part canceled instead of resting.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">GTC (good til canceled) orders have no special behavior.</p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">Client Order ID (cloid) is an optional 128 bit hex string, e.g. <code class="py-px px-1.5 min-w-6.5 justify-center items-center ring-1 ring-inset ring-tint bg-tint rounded-sm text-[.875em] leading-[calc(max(1.20em,1.25rem))] break-all">0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef</code></p><p class="has-[.button,input]:flex has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:flex-wrap has-[.button,input]:gap-2 has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 decoration-primary/6 print:break-inside-avoid w-full max-w-[unset] text-start self-start justify-start">}

Meaning of keys:
a is asset
b is isBuy
p is price
s is size
r is reduceOnly
t is type
c is cloid (client order id)

Meaning of keys in optional builder argument:
b is the address the should receive the additional fee
f is the size of the fee in tenths of a basis point e.g. if f is 10, 1bp of the order notional  will be charged to the user and sent to the builder</p></div></div></div><div class="table_row__LpfCG" has-[.button,input]:items-center mx-auto page-width-wide:mx-0 w-full decoration-primary/6 max-w-3xl print:break-inside-avoid page-api-block:ml-0 text-start self-start justify-start">Schedule a cancel-all operation at a future time. Not including time will remove the scheduled cancel operation. The time must be at least 5 seconds after the current time. Once the time comes, all open orders will be canceled and a trigger count will be incremented. The max number of triggers per day is 10. This trigger count is reset at 00:00 UTC.</p><h2 id="modify-an-order" class="text-xl @xs:text-2xl @lg:text-3xl font-semibold heading pdf-heading flex items-baseline scroll-mt-(--content-scroll-margin)         document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
          if (Array.from(document.scripts).find(script => script.src.includes('rocket-loader.min.js'))) {
            const alert = document.createElement('div');
            alert.className = 'p-4 mb-4 text-sm text-red-800 rounded-lg bg-red-50 mt-8 mx-8';
            alert.innerHTML = `
              <strong>Error in site configuration:</strong>
                It looks like ${window.location.hostname} has been incorrectly configured in Cloudflare. This may lead to unexpected behavior or issues with the page loading. If you are the owner of this site, please refer to <a href="https://gitbook.com/docs/published-documentation/custom-domain/configure-dns#are-you-using-cloudflare" class="underline">GitBook's documentation</a> for steps to fix the problem.
              `;

            document.body.prepend(alert);
          }
